24 class CartesianWaypointMotion : public PositionWaypointMotion<franka::CartesianPose, CartesianState> {
25  public:
37  explicit CartesianWaypointMotion(
38  const std::vector<PositionWaypoint<CartesianState>> &waypoints,
39  const RelativeDynamicsFactor &relative_dynamics_factor = 1.0, bool return_when_finished = true,
40  Affine ee_frame = Affine::Identity());
41 
42  [[nodiscard]] const Affine &ee_frame() const { return ee_frame_; }
43 
44  protected:
45  void initWaypointMotion(
46  const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<franka::CartesianPose> &previous_command,
47  ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) override;
48 
49  void setNewWaypoint(
50  const RobotState &robot_state, const std::optional<franka::CartesianPose> &previous_command,
51  const PositionWaypoint<CartesianState> &new_waypoint, ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) override;
52 
53  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<Vector7d, Vector7d, Vector7d> getAbsoluteInputLimits() const override;
54 
55  [[nodiscard]] franka::CartesianPose getControlSignal(
56  const RobotState &robot_state, const franka::Duration &time_step,
57  const std::optional<franka::CartesianPose> &previous_command,
58  const ruckig::InputParameter<7> &input_parameter) override;
59 
60  [[nodiscard]] std::tuple<Vector7d, Vector7d, Vector7d> getDesiredState(const RobotState &robot_state) const override;
61 
62  private:
63  CartesianState target_state_;
64  Affine ref_frame_;
65  Affine ee_frame_;
66 
67  static Vector7d vec_cart_rot_elbow(double cart, double rot, double elbow) {
68  return {cart, cart, cart, rot, rot, rot, elbow};
69  }
70 };
